label: JSON parse
description: Parse every tracked JSON file outside node_modules and dist
command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),cp=require('child_process');const files=cp.execSync('git ls-files *.json',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim().split(/\n/).filter(Boolean).filter(f=>!/(^|\/)(node_modules|dist)\//.test(f));for(const f of files){JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))}console.log('checked '+files.length+' JSON files')"
